title: May 2026
summary: Nutrient sensing and inflammatory aging remain the clearest areas moving toward useful human results. The rest of the field still leans harder on biology than long-lasting human benefit.
bullets: No hallmark crossed the line into long-lasting disease or mortality relevance.
Cellular senescence and nutrient sensing stayed prominent but still evidence-limited.
The site's current center of gravity remains early human testing.
review_reason: Monthly state-of-field edition covering reviewed public publication activity through 2026-05-30.
